programmes.show_description: A wall-to-wall celebration of Rave's most Iconic Piano Riffs. Uplifting anthems from N-Joi, Bizarre Inc., Strike, The Prodigy and plenty more.
6 Music takes you to the dark side with the finest goth, electronic and dark pop music, with Prince, The March Violets, Imogen Heap, Yeule, Scheer and more.
Louise shares her favourite tracks for soothing a broken heart!
Russell shares his favourite dance tracks, guaranteed to get people on their feet!
Immerse yourself in this two-hour selection of dreamy and summery ambient sounds to help you concentrate on your goals.
Need to slow things down? Afrodeutsche brings the mellow Saturday flow you need to really hit that deeply relaxing vibe.
Mark and Stuart present a feast of music and chat plus Melody Prochet AKA Melody's Echo Chamber shares her First, Last and Everything and chats about her latest album and tour.
Beth Ditto kicks off her first Saturday morning show on 6!
Zakia speaks with Shabaka about his latest album, Of The Earth, and the pair reflect on spirituality, artistic evolution and his shifting approach to sound.
Joining the musical dots, soul, hip-hop, house, Afro, Latin, electronica, jazz and beyond.

programmes.show_name: The Stuart Maconie Funk and Soul Show
programmes.show_description: The best in funk and soul with Stuart Maconie sitting in.
Don's Saturday night selections cross time, space and genre. This weekend, his got culture clash cuts by The Congos, Kim Gordon, Vibronics, Happy Mondays and Nightmares On Wax.
SHERELLE's back for another Saturday night, playing brilliantly leftfield music from across the rave continuum! Featuring new delights from foodman, FlyLo, Rosa Pistola and more.
London-based staple of the underground, Ploy, enters the Sweatbox mix.
The story of 90s rave and beyond through the voices of three iconic female DJs and producers.
Enjoy this hand-selected mix with perfect vibes to slow down your world featuring Midge Ure, Charlotte Day Wilson and Morrissey.
Two hours of soothing sounds hand-picked for rest and relaxation. With music from Arooj Aftab, Sly & The Family Stone, Timber Timbre, Lucinda Chua, The Smiths and more.
Let AFRODEUTSCHE provide the perfect Easter Sunday soundtrack with music from Q Lazzarus, Jonah Thompson, Joshua Idehen and Sergio Mendes.
Mark and Stuart present a feast of great music and chat for weekend breakfast.
London-based musician Tom Misch on his new album Full Circle and ancient industrial noises from the London museum of water and steam.
Gideon Coe sits in for Guy and brings you Easter treats (that's songs about Easter and not chocolate eggs).
Jarvis returns to the 6 Music airwaves for a year! In this first show, he's going to take you on a sonic excursion down to New Zealand and Australia.
Stephen O'Malley, founding member of drone metal icons Sunn O))) selects his End of Days track.
Stuart's featured album is Herbie Hancock's jazz fusion classic Head Hunters. Plus, Athenian psychedelia, Welsh post hardcore and Norwegian ambient jazz.
Join Zakia for some smooth Sunday selections, with devotional sounds, desert blues, and plenty of tracks from Ethiopia, inspired by her guests - the duo ZENA.
